items.title: Freight train and bus crash kills at least eight in Bangkok
items.dek: Police and rescue officials said the collision sparked a fire that engulfed the bus.

items.title: Lewandowski to leave Barça at end of season
items.dek: Robert Lewandowski has announced he will leave Barcelona at the end of the season when his contract expires.
